phrases.intent_en: Ask which local cheese varieties are served
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿qué quesos locales sirven aquí?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, keh KEH-sohs loh-KAH-les SEER-vehn ah-KEE?

likely_response.translation_en: There are tetilla and arzúa available.

responses.english: There are tetilla and arzúa available.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to order pulpo a la gallega
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde se pide el pulpo a la gallega?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ¿DOHN-deh seh PEE-deh el POOL-poh ah lah gah-YEH-gah?

likely_response.local: En la barra principal, al fondo.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN LAH BAHR-rah preen-thee-PAHL AHL FOHN-doh
likely_response.translation_en: At the main bar, in the back.

responses.english: At the main bar, in the back.
responses.phonetic: EHN LAH BAHR-rah preen-thee-PAHL AHL FOHN-doh
responses.french: En la barra principal, al fondo.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to pay at the bar
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde se paga en la barra?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DON-deh seh PAH-gah en lah BAH-rrah?

likely_response.local: En la caja al final de la barra.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN LAH KAH-hah AHL fee-NAHL DEH LAH BAHR-rah
likely_response.translation_en: Directly here, at the cash register.

responses.english: Directly here, at the cash register.
responses.phonetic: EHN LAH KAH-hah AHL fee-NAHL DEH LAH BAHR-rah
responses.french: En la caja al final de la barra.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to order wine at the bar
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿cómo puedo pedir vino en la barra?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, KOH-moh PWEH-doh peh-DEER BEE-noh en lah BAH-rrah?

likely_response.local: Pida directamente en la barra, le atendemos en seguida.
likely_response.pronunciation: PEE-dah dee-rehth-tah-MEHN-teh EHN LAH BAHR-rah LEH ah-tehn-DEH-mohs EHN seh-g-EE-dah
likely_response.translation_en: Order directly at the bar, we will serve you shortly.

responses.english: Order directly at the bar, we will serve you shortly.
responses.phonetic: PEE-dah dee-rehth-tah-MEHN-teh EHN LAH BAHR-rah LEH ah-tehn-DEH-mohs EHN seh-g-EE-dah
responses.french: Pida directamente en la barra, le atendemos en seguida.
